principle: Salesforce standard skill content must not be modified or deleted directly. Local behavior must be layered additively through overlays, wrappers, project playbooks, or install steps.

installed_cursor_skills.legacy_adlc_standard_skills_status: may remain installed for compatibility; cleanup is deferred until alias/delegation behavior is approved

corporate_artifact_repo.note: Not cloned in the current workspace during Phase 3/bootstrap reconciliation. Artifact push/PR workflow must be run from a verified clone of this repo.

salesforce_cli_reference.note: Bootstrap/status must verify command availability, not just that sf exists.

local_custom_components.name: adlc-drive
local_custom_components.proposed_target: local overlay wrapper coordinating Salesforce consolidated skills

local_custom_components.name: adlc-execute
local_custom_components.proposed_target: local overlay wrapper for plan/execute/eval/handoff phases

local_custom_components.name: adlc-ticket
local_custom_components.proposed_target: local wrapper/process skill for ticket readiness and ADLC intake

local_custom_components.name: adlc-discover-section0
local_custom_components.proposed_target: evaluate whether this belongs in developing-agentforce or local architecture/discovery playbook

local_custom_components.name: adlc-optimize-section3ui
local_custom_components.proposed_target: evaluate against observing-agentforce; possible conflict with upstream .agent-file source-of-truth guidance

local_custom_components.name: adlc-test-csv-export
local_custom_components.proposed_target: evaluate whether this belongs in testing-agentforce or local eval/reporting playbook

local_custom_components.name: project-adlc-framework
local_custom_components.proposed_target: local project playbooks, docs, report scripts, ticket guides, versioning, and artifact conventions

open_decisions: Whether legacy additive patches should become patch files against upstream, local project playbook guidance, or wrapper behavior.
Whether YOUR_ORG/YOUR_ADLC_ARTIFACT_REPO is both overlay source and artifact store, or artifact store only.
How to install overlays for Cursor while Salesforce upstream primarily documents Claude plugin and file-copy install.
